# zstack_vrouter_route_table (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage VRouter route tables in ZStack. A VRouter route table contains routing entries for virtual routers.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the VRouter route table.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the VRouter route table.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the VRouter route table.
